---
title: "Chapter 5: Back Matter"
output: html_document
---

# Appendix

This appendix contains supplementary information regarding parser edge cases and raw markdown formatting structures.

## Parser Verification Checklist

1. Verify all code block tokens (` ``` `) render properly.
2. Ensure math blocks ($\$$ and $\$\$$) parse without escaping errors.
3. Validate that headers compile into hierarchical navigation trees.

# References

* Fisher, R. A. (1925). *Statistical Methods for Research Workers*. Oliver and Boyd.
* Pearson, K. (1900). *On the criterion that a given system of deviations from the probable in the case of a correlated system of variables is such that it can be reasonably supposed to have arisen from random sampling*. Philosophical Magazine.
